---
title: '- 1/26/2014 09:30 AM Gatewaypeople'
date: '2014-01-27T12:59:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6495581390998564124'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/1262014-0930-am-gatewaypeople.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Church Notes'
---

&nbsp;- 1/26/2014 09:30 AM Gatewaypeople<br />
<br />
&nbsp;- 2 Tim 2:13 Study to show thyself approved<br />
&nbsp;- 60% of church goers read their Bible rarely.<br />
&nbsp;- Notice the narrative. Where Jesus says something, ei location, is very important.<br />
&nbsp;- John 6:12-13 12 baskets left over? Why are there leftovers? Why did they count them? Why is it recorded?<br />
<br />
&nbsp;- N Gallilie was the land of the 12. 12 baskets leftover because He is the bread of life to the 12 tribes of Israel<br />
<br />
&nbsp;- Mark 7:12 Decapolis was known as the land of the land of the 7. The 7 nations driven out by Israel. He had 7 loaves because He is the bread of life to the gentiles.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Tips to study the Word<br />
&nbsp;- 1. Notice the Narrative<br />
&nbsp;- 2. Ask Questions<br />
